mnemonics: Major Items Create Environmental Problems Sending Waste To The Earth
Most Items Can Be Repurposed Everyday
keyPoints: Definition: Composition and generation refer to the process of creating and producing waste, which can be hazardous to the environment.
Types of waste: Solid, liquid, and gas waste can be produced through various activities such as consumerism, industrial processes, and waste disposal practices.
Factors affecting composition and generation: Population growth, consumption patterns, waste management practices, and technological advancements all contribute to the generation of waste.
